test.note: 7 tests passed, 2 failures are pre-existing (DATABASE_URL not set for dsn-parser, INBOUND_API_KEY not set for e2e). Not introduced by docker milestone.

typecheck.note: 3 errors all 'Cannot find module bun:test' in .test.ts files — pre-existing tsc/bun type resolution issue, not introduced by docker milestone.

lint.note: 315 errors all in pre-existing content pages (app/(content)/). Docker milestone files (next.config.ts, app/api/health/route.ts) pass lint individually.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify 'Drizzle ORM only — no raw SQL' to distinguish between raw SQL strings and drizzle's sql`` tagged template helper, which is idiomatic. Suggested wording: 'Drizzle ORM only — use query builder or sql`` tagged template, no raw string queries'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: app/api/health/route.ts uses db.execute(sql`SELECT 1`) which is idiomatic drizzle, but the current wording could be misread as prohibiting this. Multiple existing files also use sql from drizzle-orm.

rejectedObservations.observation: cloudflared TUNNEL_URL env var is non-functional in config-file mode
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous — the env var serves as inline documentation in docker-compose.yml showing what the config should route to. Documenting this separately adds little value; operators who use cloudflared already know config.yml controls ingress rules.
not actionable — refactor-worker is a built-in/project droid, not a repo-managed skill file. The skill definition lives in the droid system, not in .factory/skills/.
